history.content: What workspace does the news team have access to

The **News Channel** team has access to the **same local SmallClaw workspace/project folder you’re in right now** (i.e., the repo/files visible via the file tools like `list_directory`, `read_file`, `create_file`, etc.).

It does **not** get a separate sandboxed workspace by default—team members operate in this shared workspace unless you explicitly set up a different root/path or separate environment.
